mutation_policy: no source mutation, no branch mutation, no release publication, no compatibility certification, no artistic acceptance

capabilities.name: screensave.project.status
capabilities.effect: read-only project state receipt
capabilities.input_policy: none

capabilities.name: screensave.project.capabilities
capabilities.effect: read-only fixed capability profile
capabilities.input_policy: none

capabilities.name: screensave.catalog.read
capabilities.effect: read committed generated product inventory
capabilities.input_policy: committed catalog/generated/products_inventory.json

capabilities.name: screensave.profiles.read
capabilities.effect: read fixed admitted proof profile catalog
capabilities.input_policy: committed generated proof registry

capabilities.name: screensave.validation.t0
capabilities.effect: run ScreenSave T0 authority, syntax, docs, AIDE pilot, and whitespace checks
capabilities.input_policy: fixed T0 validation tier

capabilities.name: screensave.validation.t1
capabilities.effect: run ScreenSave T0 plus T1 affected-subsystem checks
capabilities.input_policy: fixed T1 validation tier

capabilities.name: screensave.validation.t2
capabilities.effect: run ScreenSave T0/T1 plus full local project gate and two-canary proof profiles
capabilities.input_policy: fixed T2 validation tier

capabilities.name: screensave.validation.t3
capabilities.effect: run ScreenSave T0/T1/T2 plus Gate C acceptance and native current Windows evidence gates
capabilities.input_policy: fixed T3 Gate C/native evidence validation tier
capabilities.state_probe: Gate C acceptance report, build receipts, artifact manifests, PE audits, and EvidencePacket checks

capabilities.name: screensave.build.windows-current-x86
capabilities.effect: run the fixed current Windows x86 saver build profile
capabilities.input_policy: fixed build profile, fixed VS2022 Release Win32 lane, exact saver artifact set
capabilities.state_probe: build receipt, artifact-set manifest, and profile-aware PE audit

capabilities.name: screensave.build.windows-current-tools
capabilities.effect: run the fixed current Windows companion-tool build profile
capabilities.input_policy: fixed build profile, fixed VS2022 Release Win32 lane, exact tool artifact set
capabilities.state_probe: build receipt, artifact-set manifest, and profile-aware PE audit

capabilities.name: screensave.proof.nocturne.render
capabilities.effect: write deterministic Nocturne capture artifacts
capabilities.input_policy: bounded Nocturne canary arguments
capabilities.state_probe: sslab render receipt and artifact manifest

capabilities.name: screensave.proof.capture.compare
capabilities.effect: write capture comparison JSON
capabilities.input_policy: captures under validation/captures or out/aide/screensave-project-adapter only
capabilities.state_probe: sslab comparison receipt and artifact manifest

capabilities.name: screensave.artifact.pe.audit
capabilities.effect: write PE binary-fact audit report
capabilities.input_policy: artifact-profile audit roots from tools/project_adapter/artifact_profile_audit_roots.json
capabilities.state_probe: PE audit report and artifact manifest

capabilities.name: screensave.proof.nocturne.reference-v0.v1
capabilities.effect: write fixed Nocturne reference profile proof through the current v1 path
capabilities.input_policy: fixed catalog profile nocturne.reference.v0 on path v1

capabilities.name: screensave.proof.nocturne.reference-v0.v2
capabilities.effect: write fixed Nocturne reference profile proof through the portable v2 path
capabilities.input_policy: fixed catalog profile nocturne.reference.v0 on path v2

capabilities.name: screensave.proof.ricochet.reference-v1.v1
capabilities.effect: write fixed Ricochet reference profile proof through the current v1 path
capabilities.input_policy: fixed catalog profile ricochet.reference.v1 on path v1

capabilities.name: screensave.proof.ricochet.reference-v1.v2
capabilities.effect: write fixed Ricochet reference profile proof through the portable v2 path
capabilities.input_policy: fixed catalog profile ricochet.reference.v1 on path v2

capabilities.name: screensave.proof.portable-v2.equivalence
capabilities.effect: write fixed Nocturne/Ricochet v1-v2 equivalence proof and adapter receipt
capabilities.input_policy: fixed canary profile set only

capabilities.name: screensave.bundle.portable-v2.equivalence
capabilities.effect: record the fixed portable v2 equivalence receipt as the bundle payload reference
capabilities.input_policy: fixed canary profile set only

capabilities.name: screensave.bundle.nocturne.reference-v0.v1
capabilities.effect: normalize fixed Nocturne v1 reference profile proof as Proof Bundle v1
capabilities.input_policy: fixed catalog profile nocturne.reference.v0 on path v1
capabilities.state_probe: proof-bundle-v1.json, profile-proof.json, adapter-proof.json, and artifact manifest

capabilities.name: screensave.bundle.nocturne.reference-v0.v2
capabilities.effect: normalize fixed Nocturne v2 reference profile proof as Proof Bundle v1
capabilities.input_policy: fixed catalog profile nocturne.reference.v0 on path v2
capabilities.state_probe: proof-bundle-v1.json, profile-proof.json, adapter-proof.json, and artifact manifest

capabilities.name: screensave.bundle.ricochet.reference-v1.v1
capabilities.effect: normalize fixed Ricochet v1 reference profile proof as Proof Bundle v1
capabilities.input_policy: fixed catalog profile ricochet.reference.v1 on path v1
capabilities.state_probe: proof-bundle-v1.json, profile-proof.json, adapter-proof.json, and artifact manifest

capabilities.name: screensave.bundle.ricochet.reference-v1.v2
capabilities.effect: normalize fixed Ricochet v2 reference profile proof as Proof Bundle v1
capabilities.input_policy: fixed catalog profile ricochet.reference.v1 on path v2
capabilities.state_probe: proof-bundle-v1.json, profile-proof.json, adapter-proof.json, and artifact manifest
